description: Danfo font family designed by Afrotype, Seyi Olusanya, Eyiyemi Adegbite, David Udoh, Mirko Velimirović

script: $fontFiles = @("Danfo[ELSH].ttf") foreach ($file in $fontFiles) {     $fontName = [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($file)     Remove-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Fonts' -Name "$fontName (TrueType)" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue     Remove-Item "$env:windir\Fonts\$file" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
